title: Police vs. Organized Crime
overview: Ayako Hanabishi, a teacher, and star athlete Wakana Nanamiya find themselves stranded far from Earth when their school closes down. Can they get home?

title: The Villainous Bosses
overview: With Paraila joining them, they head off to Kurespe, evading the Detective Tatsue Yokoyama. But their ship crashes into an unknown planet.

title: The Quarreling Gamblers
overview: The three find themselves in a hotel suite room where Paraila goes to a casino to earn money quickly to use towards heading back to Earth.

title: Women in Hell
overview: Paraila steals a large passenger ship and heads towards Earth! But the ship was being repaired and has no outer walls and a defective main computer!
